headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.

headline: Upway Accelerates Innovation with New Chief Technology Officer
summary: Upway, the leading international platform for refurbished electric bikes, announces the arrival of Nathan Wilson as Chief Technology Officer. With an international background, he joins to strengthen and expand the Tech & Product teams at a time when Upway is accelerating its ambitions, including 50 planned hires and $15 million in Research & Development investments over the next 24 months. headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on DoorDash, Lowers Price Target to $255
summary: Mizuho  analyst Lloyd Walmsley   maintains DoorDash (NASDAQ:DASH) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $320 to $255.
